---
title: "CURRENTLY IN DEVELOPMENT"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: false
resources:
  - SONA_Guide.pdf
---


---

## SONA Participant Guide

<div class="pdf-viewer">
  <iframe
    src="SONA_Guide.pdf"
    width="100%"
    height="800px"
    style="border: none;">
  </iframe>
  <p>If the PDF does not display, <a href="SONA_Guide.pdf" target="_blank">click here to download it</a>.</p>
</div>

<style>
.pdf-viewer {
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
}

html:not([data-bs-theme="dark"]) .pdf-viewer {
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .pdf-viewer {
  background-color: #212529;
  border: 1px solid #343a40;
  box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
}
</style>
